Dosecolor Backend
  • Modules
  • API Routes
  • View page source

API Routes

Authentication router — Google OAuth, invitation accept, forgot/reset password.

class src.routers.auth.GoogleOAuthConfigResponse(*, client_id: str, redirect_uri: str)[source]

Bases: BaseModel

Values the browser needs to build the Google authorize URL. Client secret stays server-only.

client_id: str
model_config = {}

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

redirect_uri: str
src.routers.auth.forgot_password(body: ForgotPasswordRequest, db: Session = Depends(dependency=<function get_db>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]

Send a password-reset email. Always returns 200 to avoid user enumeration.

src.routers.auth.google_callback_get(db: Session = Depends(dependency=<function get_db>, use_cache=True, scope=None), code: str | None = Query(None), state: str | None = Query(None))[source]

Accept ?code=&state= (e.g. if redirect_uri points at the API).

src.routers.auth.google_callback_post(db: Session = Depends(dependency=<function get_db>, use_cache=True, scope=None), code: str | None = Query(None), state: str | None = Query(None), body: GoogleCallbackBody | None = Body(None))[source]

Exchange the Google authorization code for tokens.

Send code and state either as JSON { “code”, “state” } or as query parameters (some SPAs POST to the callback URL that Google redirected to, which only has ?code=&state=).

src.routers.auth.google_oauth_public_config()[source]

Return Client ID and redirect URI from server env so the frontend does not need NEXT_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID. Call this before redirecting to Google.

src.routers.auth.google_oauth_start(redirect_uri: str | None = Query(None))[source]

Returns Google authorize URL and signed state JWT (store state client-side; send it back with the authorization code on callback).

Do not append a different redirect_uri than the server’s .env — the backend ignores arbitrary values and always uses GOOGLE_REDIRECT_URI. A mismatched ?redirect_uri= query param is rejected so misconfigured frontends fail fast.

src.routers.auth.reset_password(body: ResetPasswordRequest, db: Session = Depends(dependency=<function get_db>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]

Consume a reset token and set a new password.

src.routers.auth.set_password(body: SetPasswordRequest, db: Session = Depends(dependency=<function get_db>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]

Accept an invitation token and set the user’s password.

src.routers.users.create_user(data: UserCreate, db: Session = Depends(dependency=<function get_db>, use_cache=True, scope=None), current_user: User = Depends(dependency=<function require_salon_admin_or_manager_or_super>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]
src.routers.users.delete_user(user_id: str, db: Session = Depends(dependency=<function get_db>, use_cache=True, scope=None), current_user: User = Depends(dependency=<function require_admin_or_super>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]
src.routers.users.get_me(current_user: User = Depends(dependency=<function get_current_user>, use_cache=True, scope=None), db: Session = Depends(dependency=<function get_db>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]
src.routers.users.get_user(user_id: str, db: Session = Depends(dependency=<function get_db>, use_cache=True, scope=None), current_user: User = Depends(dependency=<function get_current_user>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]
src.routers.users.list_users(tenant_id: str | None = Query(None), page: int = Query(1), page_size: int = Query(20), db: Session = Depends(dependency=<function get_db>, use_cache=True, scope=None), current_user: User = Depends(dependency=<function require_salon_admin_or_manager_or_super>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]
src.routers.users.login(login_data: LoginRequest, db: Session = Depends(dependency=<function get_db>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]

Authenticate a user with email and password only. Searches for users by email and validates password.

src.routers.users.refresh_token(data: TokenRefresh, db: Session = Depends(dependency=<function get_db>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]

Refresh an access token using a valid refresh token.

src.routers.users.update_user(user_id: str, data: UserUpdate, db: Session = Depends(dependency=<function get_db>, use_cache=True, scope=None), current_user: User = Depends(dependency=<function require_salon_admin_or_manager_or_super>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]
src.routers.tenants.cancel_my_subscription(data: SubscriptionCancelRequest, db: Session = Depends(dependency=<function get_db>, use_cache=True, scope=None), current_user: User = Depends(dependency=<function require_role.<locals>._check>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]

Cancel auto-renewal at end of current period (salon admin).

src.routers.tenants.create_location(tenant_id: str, data: LocationCreate, db: Session = Depends(dependency=<function get_db>, use_cache=True, scope=None), current_user: User = Depends(dependency=<function require_salon_staff_admin_or_manager>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]
src.routers.tenants.create_tenant(data: TenantCreate, db: Session = Depends(dependency=<function get_db>, use_cache=True, scope=None), _: User = Depends(dependency=<function require_super_admin>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]

Create a tenant (platform administrators only). Salon tenants must use is_platform=false.

src.routers.tenants.delete_location(tenant_id: str, location_id: str, db: Session = Depends(dependency=<function get_db>, use_cache=True, scope=None), current_user: User = Depends(dependency=<function require_role.<locals>._check>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]
src.routers.tenants.delete_tenant(tenant_id: str, db: Session = Depends(dependency=<function get_db>, use_cache=True, scope=None), _: User = Depends(dependency=<function require_super_admin>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]
src.routers.tenants.get_my_subscription(db: Session = Depends(dependency=<function get_db>, use_cache=True, scope=None), current_user: User = Depends(dependency=<function get_current_user>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]

Current salon subscription (flat-rate dose plan, no payment provider).

src.routers.tenants.get_my_subscription_events(page: int = Query(1), page_size: int = Query(20), db: Session = Depends(dependency=<function get_db>, use_cache=True, scope=None), current_user: User = Depends(dependency=<function require_role.<locals>._check>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]

Billing audit history for the current salon (admin only).

src.routers.tenants.get_my_tenant(db: Session = Depends(dependency=<function get_db>, use_cache=True, scope=None), current_user: User = Depends(dependency=<function get_current_user>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]

Return the current user’s tenant (salon or platform). Any authenticated user.

src.routers.tenants.get_tenant(tenant_id: str, db: Session = Depends(dependency=<function get_db>, use_cache=True, scope=None), current_user: User = Depends(dependency=<function get_current_user>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]
src.routers.tenants.list_locations(tenant_id: str, page: int = Query(1), page_size: int = Query(20), db: Session = Depends(dependency=<function get_db>, use_cache=True, scope=None), current_user: User = Depends(dependency=<function get_current_user>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]
src.routers.tenants.list_tenants(page: int = Query(1), page_size: int = Query(20), include_platform: bool = Query(False), db: Session = Depends(dependency=<function get_db>, use_cache=True, scope=None), _: User = Depends(dependency=<function require_super_admin>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]

List salon tenants (and optionally the platform tenant). Platform administrators only.

src.routers.tenants.reactivate_my_subscription(db: Session = Depends(dependency=<function get_db>, use_cache=True, scope=None), current_user: User = Depends(dependency=<function require_role.<locals>._check>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]

Turn auto-renewal back on (salon admin).

src.routers.tenants.register_tenant(data: TenantRegistration, db: Session = Depends(dependency=<function get_db>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]

Register a new tenant (salon business).

This endpoint: 1. Creates a new tenant 2. Creates a default location 3. Creates the first admin user 4. Returns tenant, location, and admin user info

After registration, use the admin email and password to login.

src.routers.tenants.renew_my_subscription(data: SubscriptionRenewRequest, db: Session = Depends(dependency=<function get_db>, use_cache=True, scope=None), current_user: User = Depends(dependency=<function require_role.<locals>._check>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]

Extend or restore salon subscription (salon admin). Manual renew when not on Stripe.

src.routers.tenants.renew_tenant_subscription_admin(tenant_id: str, data: SubscriptionRenewRequest, db: Session = Depends(dependency=<function get_db>, use_cache=True, scope=None), _: User = Depends(dependency=<function require_super_admin>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]

Platform admin: renew or extend a salon subscription.

src.routers.tenants.update_location(tenant_id: str, location_id: str, data: LocationUpdate, db: Session = Depends(dependency=<function get_db>, use_cache=True, scope=None), current_user: User = Depends(dependency=<function require_salon_staff_admin_or_manager>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]

src.routers.inventory.get_inventory_item(item_id: str, db: Session = Depends(dependency=<function get_db>, use_cache=True, scope=None), current_user: User = Depends(dependency=<function get_current_user>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]
src.routers.inventory.list_inventory(location_id: str = Depends(dependency=<function resolve_location_id>, use_cache=True, scope=None), db: Session = Depends(dependency=<function get_db>, use_cache=True, scope=None), current_user: User = Depends(dependency=<function get_current_user>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]
src.routers.inventory.list_item_transactions(item_id: str, page: int = Query(1), page_size: int = Query(20), db: Session = Depends(dependency=<function get_db>, use_cache=True, scope=None), current_user: User = Depends(dependency=<function get_current_user>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]
src.routers.inventory.list_transactions(page: int = Query(1), page_size: int = Query(20), db: Session = Depends(dependency=<function get_db>, use_cache=True, scope=None), current_user: User = Depends(dependency=<function get_current_user>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]
src.routers.inventory.low_stock_alerts(location_id: str = Depends(dependency=<function resolve_location_id>, use_cache=True, scope=None), db: Session = Depends(dependency=<function get_db>, use_cache=True, scope=None), current_user: User = Depends(dependency=<function get_current_user>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]
src.routers.inventory.mark_item_ordered(item_id: str, db: Session = Depends(dependency=<function get_db>, use_cache=True, scope=None), current_user: User = Depends(dependency=<function get_current_user>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]
src.routers.inventory.reorder_list(ordered: bool = Query(False), location_id: str = Depends(dependency=<function resolve_location_id>, use_cache=True, scope=None), db: Session = Depends(dependency=<function get_db>, use_cache=True, scope=None), current_user: User = Depends(dependency=<function get_current_user>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]
src.routers.inventory.unmark_item_ordered(item_id: str, db: Session = Depends(dependency=<function get_db>, use_cache=True, scope=None), current_user: User = Depends(dependency=<function get_current_user>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]
src.routers.inventory.update_inventory_item(item_id: str, data: InventoryItemUpdate, db: Session = Depends(dependency=<function get_db>, use_cache=True, scope=None), current_user: User = Depends(dependency=<function require_salon_staff_admin_or_manager>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]
src.routers.formulas.create_formula(data: FormulaCreate, db: Session = Depends(dependency=<function get_db>, use_cache=True, scope=None), current_user: User = Depends(dependency=<function get_current_user>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]

Create a formula and automatically deduct inventory for each product used. The created_by_user_id is set from the authenticated user.

Validates inventory sufficiency before creating the formula. Returns 400 Bad Request if inventory is insufficient.

src.routers.formulas.create_formula_visit(data: FormulaVisitCreate, db: Session = Depends(dependency=<function get_db>, use_cache=True, scope=None), current_user: User = Depends(dependency=<function get_current_user>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]

Finalize one visit ticket with multiple labeled bowls in a single atomic transaction. Validates inventory across all bowls before deducting stock.

src.routers.formulas.delete_formula(formula_id: str, db: Session = Depends(dependency=<function get_db>, use_cache=True, scope=None), current_user: User = Depends(dependency=<function require_salon_staff_admin_or_manager>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]
src.routers.formulas.get_formula(formula_id: str, db: Session = Depends(dependency=<function get_db>, use_cache=True, scope=None), current_user: User = Depends(dependency=<function get_current_user>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]
src.routers.formulas.get_formula_visit(visit_id: str, db: Session = Depends(dependency=<function get_db>, use_cache=True, scope=None), current_user: User = Depends(dependency=<function get_current_user>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]
src.routers.formulas.list_formulas(customer_id: str | None = None, location_id: str = Depends(dependency=<function resolve_location_id>, use_cache=True, scope=None), page: int = Query(1), page_size: int = Query(20), db: Session = Depends(dependency=<function get_db>, use_cache=True, scope=None), current_user: User = Depends(dependency=<function get_current_user>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]
src.routers.formulas.update_formula(formula_id: str, data: FormulaUpdate, db: Session = Depends(dependency=<function get_db>, use_cache=True, scope=None), current_user: User = Depends(dependency=<function get_current_user>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]

Platform operator endpoints (bootstrap, billing plans, utilities).

src.routers.platform.bootstrap_super_admin(data: PlatformBootstrapRequest, db: Session = Depends(dependency=<function get_db>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]

Creates the platform tenant (is_platform=true) and the first SUPER_ADMIN user.

Disabled unless PLATFORM_BOOTSTRAP_SECRET is set in the server environment. Refuses to run if any SUPER_ADMIN user already exists.

src.routers.platform.get_billing_config(db: Session = Depends(dependency=<function get_db>, use_cache=True, scope=None), _: User = Depends(dependency=<function require_super_admin>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]
src.routers.platform.list_billing_plans(db: Session = Depends(dependency=<function get_db>, use_cache=True, scope=None), _: User = Depends(dependency=<function require_super_admin>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]

All subscription plans including inactive (platform operators).

src.routers.platform.update_billing_config(data: PlatformBillingConfigUpdate, db: Session = Depends(dependency=<function get_db>, use_cache=True, scope=None), _: User = Depends(dependency=<function require_super_admin>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]
src.routers.platform.update_billing_plan(interval: str, data: SubscriptionPlanUpdate, db: Session = Depends(dependency=<function get_db>, use_cache=True, scope=None), _: User = Depends(dependency=<function require_super_admin>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]

Update a subscription plan tier.

Public subscription plan catalog (no auth required).

src.routers.plans.get_subscription_catalog(db: Session = Depends(dependency=<function get_db>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]

Active plans, trial length, and included features for landing, register, and billing UI.

Stripe Checkout, Customer Portal, and webhooks.

src.routers.stripe.create_checkout_session(data: StripeCheckoutRequest, db: Session = Depends(dependency=<function get_db>, use_cache=True, scope=None), current_user: User = Depends(dependency=<function require_role.<locals>._check>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]

Start Stripe Checkout for the selected billing interval (salon admin).

src.routers.stripe.create_customer_portal(db: Session = Depends(dependency=<function get_db>, use_cache=True, scope=None), current_user: User = Depends(dependency=<function require_role.<locals>._check>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]

Open Stripe Customer Portal to manage payment method, plan, or cancel (salon admin).

async src.routers.stripe.stripe_webhook(request: Request, db: Session = Depends(dependency=<function get_db>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]

Stripe webhook — sync subscription state to tenant rows.

src.routers.stripe.sync_my_subscription(db: Session = Depends(dependency=<function get_db>, use_cache=True, scope=None), current_user: User = Depends(dependency=<function require_role.<locals>._check>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]

Sync salon subscription from Stripe after checkout (fallback if webhook was delayed).

Address autocomplete — Photon (OSM, no API key by default) or optional Google Places.

class src.routers.places.PlaceAutocompleteResponse(*, predictions: list[PlacePrediction] = <factory>)[source]

Bases: BaseModel

model_config = {}

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

predictions: list[PlacePrediction]
class src.routers.places.PlacePrediction(*, description: str, place_id: str)[source]

Bases: BaseModel

description: str
model_config = {}

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

place_id: str
src.routers.places.address_autocomplete(q: str = Query(PydanticUndefined), country: str | None = Query(None), limit: int = Query(8), strict_address: bool = Query(True)) → PlaceAutocompleteResponse[source]

Address suggestions — no billing required when using the default provider.

  • photon (default): OpenStreetMap data via [Photon](https://photon.komoot.io/) public API — no API key. OK for development / light use; respect fair use or [self-host Photon](https://github.com/komoot/photon) for production load.

  • google: set PLACES_PROVIDER=google and GOOGLE_PLACES_API_KEY.
